query: SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, u.role, u.createdAt, COUNT(c.id) as chatCount, jp.id as profileId FROM users u LEFT JOIN chatMessages c ON c.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN jimmiProfiles jp ON jp.userId = u.id GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY u.createdAt ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MfKkRv4BtcjpAV.27131ce48b0a --database nkB3BF7vCNJASAUzbYZAhY --execute SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, u.role, u.createdAt, COUNT(c.id) as chatCount, jp.id as profileId FROM users u LEFT JOIN chatMessages c ON c.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN jimmiProfiles jp ON jp.userId = u.id GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY u.createdAt ASC;
